//anomaly
public sealed class Anomaly
{
    // ctor privé requis par EF Core pour la matérialisation.
    private Anomaly()
    {
        TransactionId = string.Empty;
        Currency = string.Empty;
    }

    public Guid Id { get; private set; }
    public Guid RunId { get; private set; }
    public string TransactionId { get; private set; }
    public AnomalyReason Reason { get; private set; }
    public TransactionSource Source { get; private set; }
    public DateOnly ValueDate { get; private set; }
    public string Currency { get; private set; }
    public decimal Amount { get; private set; }

    /// <summary>Détail des écarts (JSON) pour le motif <see cref="AnomalyReason.CbpFxDifferent"/>; sinon null.</summary>
    public string? DifferencesJson { get; private set; }

    public DateTimeOffset DetectedAtUtc { get; private set; }

    public static Anomaly CbpNotPresentInFx(Guid runId, AppTransaction cbp, DateTimeOffset detectedAtUtc)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(cbp);
        return new Anomaly
        {
            Id = Guid.NewGuid(),
            RunId = runId,
            TransactionId = cbp.TransactionId,
            Reason = AnomalyReason.CbpNotPresentInFx,
            Source = TransactionSource.Cbp,
            ValueDate = cbp.ValueDate,
            Currency = cbp.Currency,
            Amount = cbp.Amount,
            DetectedAtUtc = detectedAtUtc,
        };
    }

    public static Anomaly CbpFxDifferent(Guid runId, AppTransaction cbp, AppTransaction fxSentry, IReadOnlyList<FieldDifference> differences, DateTimeOffset detectedAtUtc)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(cbp);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(fxSentry);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(differences);
        return new Anomaly
        {
            Id = Guid.NewGuid(),
            RunId = runId,
            TransactionId = cbp.TransactionId,
            Reason = AnomalyReason.CbpFxDifferent,
            Source = TransactionSource.Cbp,
            ValueDate = cbp.ValueDate,
            Currency = cbp.Currency,
            Amount = cbp.Amount,
            DifferencesJson = JsonSerializer.Serialize(differences),
            DetectedAtUtc = detectedAtUtc,
        };
    }

    public static Anomaly FxNotPresentInCbp(Guid runId, AppTransaction fxSentry, DateTimeOffset detectedAtUtc)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(fxSentry);
        return new Anomaly
        {
            Id = Guid.NewGuid(),
            RunId = runId,
            TransactionId = fxSentry.TransactionId,
            Reason = AnomalyReason.FxNotPresentInCbp,
            Source = TransactionSource.FxSentry,
            ValueDate = fxSentry.ValueDate,
            Currency = fxSentry.Currency,
            Amount = fxSentry.Amount,
            DetectedAtUtc = detectedAtUtc,
        };
    }
}

// end anomaly


// FxSentryTransactionSource
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using IntegriteCBPFx.SharedKernel.Transactions;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;

namespace IntegriteCBPFx.App.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>Options de la source FXSentry (section « FxSentry » de appsettings).</summary>
public sealed class FxSentryOptions
{
    public const string SectionName = "FxSentry";

    /// <summary>Chaîne de connexion à la base SQL Server FXSentry (lecture seule).</summary>
    [Required]
    public string? ConnectionString { get; set; }

    /// <summary>Vue (schéma.objet) exposant les transactions FXSentry, créée par les DBA.</summary>
    public string ViewName { get; set; } = "dbo.vw_FxSentryTransactions";
}

/// <summary>
/// Adapter FXSentry (ResultSet B), lecture de la vue SQL Server.
///
/// 🚧 STUB walking-skeleton : renvoie une liste vide.
/// TODO(dev FX) :
///   1. Lire la vue <c>FxSentryOptions.ViewName</c> filtrée sur la date métier
///      (EF Core entité « keyless » en lecture seule, ou Dapper).
///   2. Mapper chaque ligne vers <see cref="AppTransaction"/> (Source = FxSentry).
///   3. Traduire une indisponibilité SQL en
///      <see cref="TransactionSourceUnavailableException"/>.
/// </summary>
public sealed class FxSentryTransactionSource(IOptions<FxSentryOptions> options, ILogger<FxSentryTransactionSource> logger) : IFxSentryTransactionSource
{
    private readonly FxSentryOptions _options = options.Value;

    public Task<IReadOnlyCollection<AppTransaction>> GetTransactionsAsync(DateOnly businessDate, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        logger.LogInformation(
            "[STUB FX] {BusinessDate} — vue {ViewName}. 0 transaction (adapter à implémenter).",
            businessDate, _options.ViewName);

        return Task.FromResult<IReadOnlyCollection<AppTransaction>>([]);
    }
}

//end FxSentryTransactionSource


//Cbp Transactions source
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using System.Globalization;
using System.Text.Json.Serialization;
using IntegriteCBPFx.SharedKernel.Transactions;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;

namespace IntegriteCBPFx.App.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>Options du client API CBP (section « Cbp » de appsettings).</summary>
public sealed class CbpApiOptions
{
    public const string SectionName = "Cbp";

    /// <summary>URL de base de l'API CBP.</summary>
    [Required]
    public Uri? BaseUrl { get; set; }

    /// <summary>Chemin relatif de l'endpoint des transactions.</summary>
    public string TransactionsPath { get; set; } = "/api/transactions";

    /// <summary>
    /// Statuts de transactions demandés. Défaut effectif si non configuré : ["ALL"].
    /// NB : laissé vide ici volontairement — le binder de config CONCATÈNE à la
    /// valeur par défaut d'un tableau (sinon ["ALL"] + ["ALL"] => doublon).
    /// </summary>
    public string[] Status { get; set; } = [];

    /// <summary>Délai d'attente par requête (secondes).</summary>
    [Range(1, 600)]
    public int TimeoutSeconds { get; set; } = 100;

    /// <summary>Clé d'API (à fournir via secret/variable d'environnement, jamais en clair dans le repo).</summary>
    public string? ApiKey { get; set; }
}

/// <summary>
/// Paramètres de requête de l'API CBP pour extraire les transactions.
/// </summary>
/// <remarks>Dates au format <c>YYYYMMDD</c>. Pour un run sur une date métier
/// unique, <see cref="FromTradeDate"/> = <see cref="ToTradeDate"/>.</remarks>
public sealed class CbpTransactionRequest
{
    /// <summary>Référence unique permettant de retracer la requête (corrélation/observabilité).</summary>
    [JsonPropertyName("requestId")]
    public required string RequestId { get; init; }

    /// <summary>Statuts demandés, p. ex. <c>["ALL"]</c>.</summary>
    [JsonPropertyName("status")]
    public required IReadOnlyList<string> Status { get; init; }

    /// <summary>Date de trade de début (format YYYYMMDD).</summary>
    [JsonPropertyName("fromTradeDate")]
    public required string FromTradeDate { get; init; }

    /// <summary>Date de trade de fin (format YYYYMMDD).</summary>
    [JsonPropertyName("toTradeDate")]
    public required string ToTradeDate { get; init; }
}

/// <summary>
/// Adapter CBP (ResultSet A). HttpClient typé : sa configuration (BaseAddress,
/// timeout, en-têtes, résilience) est faite dans <c>VerificationModule</c>.
///
/// 🚧 STUB walking-skeleton : construit la requête réelle (requestId/status/dates)
/// mais renvoie une liste vide pour que le squelette tourne.
/// TODO(dev CBP) :
///   1. Envoyer <see cref="CbpTransactionRequest"/> à l'API via <c>httpClient</c>
///      (selon le contrat CBP : POST JSON, ou GET avec query params).
///   2. Désérialiser la réponse (DTO dédié, découplé du domaine).
///   3. Mapper chaque ligne vers <see cref="AppTransaction"/> (Source = Cbp).
///   4. Traduire toute panne (HttpRequestException / timeout) en
///      <see cref="TransactionSourceUnavailableException"/> (cas « API down »).
/// </summary>
public sealed class CbpTransactionSource(
    HttpClient httpClient,
    IOptions<CbpApiOptions> options,
    ILogger<CbpTransactionSource> logger) : ICbpTransactionSource
{
    private readonly CbpApiOptions _options = options.Value;

    public Task<IReadOnlyCollection<AppTransaction>> GetTransactionsAsync(DateOnly businessDate, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        var request = BuildRequest(businessDate);

        logger.LogInformation(
            "[STUB CBP] requestId={RequestId} status=[{Status}] from={From} to={To} — BaseAddress={BaseAddress}. 0 transaction (adapter à implémenter).",
            request.RequestId, string.Join(',', request.Status), request.FromTradeDate, request.ToTradeDate, httpClient.BaseAddress);

        return Task.FromResult<IReadOnlyCollection<AppTransaction>>([]);
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Construit la requête CBP pour la date métier. requestId généré par appel
    /// pour la traçabilité (corrélé au run via le scope de log).
    /// </summary>
    private CbpTransactionRequest BuildRequest(DateOnly businessDate)
    {
        var tradeDate = businessDate.ToString("yyyyMMdd", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
        return new CbpTransactionRequest
        {
            RequestId = Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N"),
            Status = _options.Status.Length > 0 ? _options.Status : ["ALL"],
            FromTradeDate = tradeDate,
            ToTradeDate = tradeDate,
        };
    }
}


//end CBP transactions source
